title: Stir-Fried Chow Fun with Delicate Vegetables
description: A light and refreshing stir-fry made with delicate vegetables and Chinese chow fun noodles, finished with a hint of pickled flair.

ingredients.name: delicate vegetables (such as bean sprouts, carrots, and cabbage)

instructions: Cook the chow fun noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the tofu from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of sesame oil to the skillet, then add the delicate vegetables and broccoli.
Stir-fry the vegetables until they begin to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles, tofu, pickled ginger, soy sauce, and chili oil (if using) to the skillet.
Stir-fry everything together for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Serve the stir-fry hot, garnished with sliced scallions and an extra drizzle of soy sauce if desired.
